fixed_events.expected_effect: Extreme volatility expected. Market can swing 2-5% either way. Budget speech at 11 AM. Avoid intraday trading before 12 PM. After budget, if market stabilizes, range trading or mean reversion may work.

Monetary policy announcement at 10 AM IST. Banking and financial stocks highly volatile until decision. If rate cut: bullish for banks, use momentum. If rate hold: mildly bearish, use mean reversion. If rate hike: sharp sell-off, skip trading.
Monetary policy announcement at 10 AM IST. Banking stocks volatile. Avoid bank stocks before announcement. After decision, momentum if dovish, skip if hawkish.
Monetary policy announcement at 10 AM IST. Banking and NBFC stocks highly volatile. Wait for decision before entering bank trades.
Monetary policy announcement at 10 AM IST. Banking stocks volatile. Post-decision momentum trades if clear direction emerges.
Monetary policy announcement at 10 AM IST. Year-end liquidity concerns may amplify reaction. Banking stocks volatile.

recurring.expected_effect: Monthly expiry day. Very high volatility, especially after 2 PM. Gamma risk causes sharp moves. Wider bid-ask spreads. Range trading strategy is dangerous — avoid. Momentum may work if clear trend. Tighter stop-losses recommended (0.75x ATR instead of 1x). Consider skipping if VIX > 18.
Weekly options expiry. Mild increase in Nifty volatility after 2 PM. Normal strategies can run but be aware of sudden moves near 3:00-3:15 PM.

_instructions: HOW TO ADD YOUR OWN EVENTS: Add a new entry to 'fixed_events' with date (YYYY-MM-DD), event name, impact (high/medium/low), and expected_effect (trading guidance). For example, to add a state election: {"date": "2026-05-04", "event": "Kerala State Election Results", "impact": "high", "expected_effect": "High volatility in morning. If results are unexpected, market may gap down 1-2%. Wait for panic to settle, then buy dips in quality stocks after 10:30 AM."}
